articles.title: NTA SWAYAM January 2026 admit card out at exams.nta.nic.in: Direct link to download hall ticket here
articles.summary: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has released admit cards for the SWAYAM January 2026 semester examinations, scheduled for June 17-21, 2026. Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official website and must carry a printout to the exam center.

articles.title: MP Police Constable Band recruitment 2026 admit card released for 679 posts: Direct link to download hall ticket here
articles.summary: The Madhya Pradesh Police Department has released the admit card for the MP Police Constable Band Recruitment 2026. Candidates can download their hall tickets from June 12 to September 10, 2026, for the skill test and interview selection process.

articles.title: MPSOS Ruk Jana Nahi 2026 registration begins at mpsos.mponline.gov.in: Direct link to apply here
articles.summary: The Madhya Pradesh State Open School has begun registrations for the Ruk Jana Nahi Scheme 2026 on its official portal, with applications open till June 20. The scheme allows Class 10 and 12 students who failed in one or more subjects or wish to reappear in the June 2026 cycle to apply, subject to eligibility and document verification..

articles.title: UP CNET result 2026 released at abvmucet26.co.in: Direct link to download scorecards here
articles.summary: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University has declared the UP CNET 2026 result for BSc Nursing admissions, activating the next phase of counselling. Candidates can download their scorecards from the official portal using login credentials.
